# Tabler UI v1.4.0 (@tabler/core)

This directory contains the vendored Tabler CSS/JS files for offline use.

## Files

```
css/tabler.min.css
js/tabler.min.js
```

## Re-download / Update

Run from repo root:

```powershell
.\scripts\download-tabler.ps1
```

Source: https://www.jsdelivr.com/package/npm/@tabler/core
